# CRMChains
> CRM, bilingual VAs, AI agents, and branded ecosystems for insurance and real estate agencies.
> Serves US, Colombia, and Mexico. English and Spanish.

## Primary pages
- [Homepage](https://branding.crmchains.com/crmchains): What CRMChains is and who it serves
- [Client Showcase](https://showcase.crmchains.com/): Agencies and clients we have served
- [Brand Builder](https://branding.crmchains.com/crmchains/brand-builder): Brand research and DNA tools
- [Brand Lab](https://branding.crmchains.com/crmchains/lab): AI brand effectiveness scanner
- [Contact](https://branding.crmchains.com/crmchains#contact): Phoenix office, phone, and email

## Offer
- Branded CRM deployment (7-day go-live)
- AI agent workflows (14-day ship)
- Bilingual virtual assistants (en/es)
- Insurance + real estate + mortgage verticals
- AI Basic Suite and AI Pro Suite pricing
